description: A more formal and intentional conversation aimed at co-creating meaning and deeper understanding. It is a structured, respectful exchange of perspectives with the goal of reaching a new, shared insight.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'the' (deliberate consideration) and 'lu' (deep flow). The word's structure literally means 'a deliberate, deep flow.' This perfectly captures the intentional and profound nature of dialogue, distinguishing it from the more informal 'noika' (conversation).
